word: G2210 - ζημιόω - zēmióō - dzay-mee-o'-o - Be cast away

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be cast away
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to affect with damage, do damage to
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G2209; to injure, that is, (reflexively or passively) to experience detriment: - be cast away, receive damage, lose, suffer loss.
